name: AirTouch AT581x Radar
description: The [AirTouch AT581x radar](https://en.airtouching.com/product/32.html) (aka `AT581x`  ) is a family of 5.8GHz radar which can be used for human presence detection. It can detect tiny movements and compared to a PIR sensor **it can detect presence continuously**. This can be useful, for example, to turn the lights on when you enter a room, keep them on as long as you are there (without waving your hands at the sensor) and turn them off almost immediately after you leave the room.

config_entries.label: I2C ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [I2C](https://esphome.io/components/i2c/) if you want to use multiple I2C buses.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation. Necessary if you want to define multiple instances of this component.
